case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. ESMERALDA ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $402.75 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA, ESMERALDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA, ESMERALDA $402.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $402.75, NO COSTS ORDERED BY THE COURT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA, ESMERALDA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED AUG-25-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA, ESMERALDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S REPRESENTATIVE GRACE GLENN. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ESMERALDA ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ENRIQUEZ-ORELLANA, ESMERALDA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
